action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline eval achieved rmse_z500=1056.0, rmse_t850=5.38 with a tiny hidden=64 U-Net trained only 5 epochs. Training is very fast (~26s/epoch). Analysis: Model is likely under-capacity and under-trained; val loss rose after epoch 2 suggesting slight overfitting that regularization can fix. Decision: Scale model to hidden=128, add dropout (0.05) and weight decay (1e-5), train up to 40 epochs with early stopping patience=7. This should significantly lower RMSE while keeping runtime well under budget.
